title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain partner package adding Ollama LLM & embedding support to LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive REPL and command toolbox wrapping the Ollama REST API with history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot (jmorganca/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm (otwld/ollama-helm)
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs and text.

title: ollama-nestjs (vincenzodomina/ollama-nestjs)
summary: NestJS module providing injectable Ollama service with decorators for chat, embed, list models.

title: ollama-dagger (dagger/daggerverse/tree/main/ollama)
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for integration testing or model benchmarks.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-integrations/tree/main/integrations/ollama)
summary: Haystack integration package letting you plug Ollama models into Haystack pipelines as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-rust (mdrokz/ollama_rs)
summary: Async Rust crate exposing typed structs for every Ollama REST endpoint plus WebSocket streaming.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/OllamaSharp)
summary: .NET library and CLI that wraps Ollama with async methods and ready-to-use dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-streamlit (streamlit/ollama-streamlit-demo)
summary: Streamlit demo app showing side-by-side model comparison, token-per-second metrics and parameter tuning sliders.

title: ollama-obsidian (joethei/obsidian-ollama)
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with notes” pane powered by local Ollama models and vector search.

title: ollama-ray (ray-project/ray-llm/tree/master/examples/ollama)
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama as a scalable micro-service with autoscaling and request batching.

title: ollama-go (mxyng/ollama-go)
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming support.

title: ollama-docker-compose (gregnwosu/ollama-docker)
summary: Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Chroma, Qdrant and pre-configured reverse proxy for quick local labs.

title: ollama-discord-bot (tekwrks/ollama-bot)
summary: Discord.py bot that lets guild members chat with any Ollama model via slash commands and private threads.
